channel.title: Ric 09 on Ric - An unknown artist
channel.description: Recent content in Ric 09 on Ric - An unknown artist

item.title: Three Birds in Flight - Ric09
item.description: Short description: Three birds in flight Notes: Taken from eBay Image by Mark Strong of Meibohm Fine Arts . The description on eBay is very interesting, there will be a post about it. Other entries for this work

item.description: Short description: Three birds Notes: See Antik Bayreuth Other entries for this work
